name: memorydetective
description: iOS leak hunting + performance investigation. Reads .memgraph and .trace files, classifies retain cycles against a 36-pattern catalog (SwiftUI / Combine / Concurrency / UIKit / Core Animation / Core Data / SwiftData / Coordinator / RxSwift / Realm). v1.13 adds summarizeTrace: single-call cross-schema trace synthesis returning a pre-rendered compact markdown card with headline + per-area sub-sections + correlations + suggestedNextCalls. Plus a /summarize-trace MCP prompt. v1.12 completed the reference-tree propagation across countAlive, findRetainers, verifyFix. v1.11 added inspectTrace, diffMemgraphs ref-tree, CLI abandoned-memory mini-table. v1.10 closed the notelet retro feedback loop. v1.9 added analyzeAbandonedMemory, detectLeaksInXCTest, cleanupTraces, mainThreadViolations. Single-call build + boot + launch fixes the macOS 26.x leaks --outputGraph regression. Bridges to Swift source via SourceKit-LSP. 36 MCP tools, 34 catalog resources, 6 investigation prompts.
